transcript:
SOURCE: Fathom (via HubSpot internal notes) — https://fathom.video/share/L24o1FgNGE5KXfGsD31AynPyyhjUQmME

AI Meeting Summary ✨

Generated by Fathom // View Recording (32 mins - No highlights)

Meeting Purpose

To explore a growth partnership for Kemp Injury Law.

Key Takeaways

Goal: Grow Kemp Injury Law from a $1M/yr "side hustle" to a self-sustaining firm with 3 lawyers and 10 staff, enabling the owner to focus on other businesses.

Problem: Digital marketing is failing. A website hack caused case signings to plummet from a consistent 15–20/mo to 8 last month and 0 this month.

Need: A "true player" for a long-term partnership, requiring a clear plan, open-book reporting, and proven ROI to avoid past failures with three prior agencies.

Next Step: Proposal call booked for Mon, July 27 at 9 AM.

Topics

Firm Context & Growth Goal

Firm: Kemp Injury Law, a 2.5-year-old PI firm in Winter Haven, FL.

Owner: Adam Kemp; the firm is a "side hustle" to his primary development and construction companies.

Revenue: ~$1M/yr.

Staff: 3 staff, 1.5 lawyers (owner + part-time).

Growth Goal (3–5 yrs):

Staff: 10

Lawyers: 3

Cases: 30/mo (up from 15–20 pre-hack)

Rationale: This volume is needed to hire more lawyers and reduce the owner's operational involvement.

Current Marketing & Performance Issues

Primary Lead Source: Referrals (friends, family, doctors, lawyers).

Digital Marketing Failure: The current agency is underperforming.

Website Hack: A hack ~2.5 months ago caused a severe drop in organic rankings and case volume.

PPC Incompetence: Key search terms (e.g., "car accident lawyer near me") were missing from reports.

LSA/Social: No measurable results.

Performance Impact:

Pre-Hack: Consistent 15–20 signed cases/mo.

Post-Hack: 8 signed cases last month, 0 this month.

Synergy Hypothesis: Traditional ads (18 billboards) drive Google searches, making a strong digital presence critical.

Intake Process & Lead Tracking

Process: A dedicated staff member carries a phone 24/7, backed by a lead case manager and a call answering service.

Lead Leakage: Some leads are lost each month, but this is a secondary issue to the primary problem of insufficient lead volume.

Tracking Gap: No formal system tracks total monthly lead volume.

Partnership Requirements

Decision Criteria: Adam is evaluating 5–6 agencies for a long-term partnership.

Key Requirements:

Trust & Integrity: A good working relationship is essential.

Clear Plan: A detailed, executable strategy for growth.

Open-Book Reporting: Transparent, data-driven reports on SEO, PPC, and ROI.

References: Proof of performance from other PI firms.

Next Steps

Jonathan (smbteam.com):

Send calendar invite for the proposal call.

Email a recap with PI marketing resources and client testimonials.

Adam (Kemp Injury Law):

Attend the proposal call to review the growth strategy.

Proposal Call: Monday, July 27 @ 9:00 AM.

Action Items

Draft Polk County proposal for Adam: SEO/AEO, PPC, LSA, landing pages, social; align w/ 30 cases/mo goal - WATCH (5 secs)
Send Adam calendar invite for proposal call (Jul 27 9:00 AM) w/ Zoom link - WATCH (5 secs)
Email Adam recap + PI marketing resources + testimonials - WATCH (5 secs)
